<file>
00001| import { Network } from '../../../lib/alchemy/config';
00002| 
00003| // BigNumberish from ethers - can be string, number, or BigNumber
00004| export type BigNumberish = string | number;
00005| 
00006| // NFT token types
00007| export enum NftTokenType {
00008|   ERC721 = "ERC721",
00009|   ERC1155 = "ERC1155",
00010|   NO_SUPPORTED_NFT_STANDARD = "NO_SUPPORTED_NFT_STANDARD",
00011|   NOT_A_CONTRACT = "NOT_A_CONTRACT",
00012|   UNKNOWN = "UNKNOWN"
00013| }
00014| 
00015| // NFT filters for including/excluding results
00016| export enum NftFilters {
00017|   /** NFTs that have been classified as spam. */
00018|   SPAM = "SPAM",
00019|   /** NFTs that have been airdropped to a user. */
00020|   AIRDROPS = "AIRDROPS"
00021| }
00022| 
00023| // NFT image information
00024| export interface NftImage {
00025|   /** URL of the image stored in Alchemy's cache. */
00026|   cachedUrl?: string;
00027|   /** URL of a thumbnail sized image. */
00028|   thumbnailUrl?: string;
00029|   /** URL of the image in png format */
00030|   pngUrl?: string;
00031|   /** The type of the media image. */
00032|   contentType?: string;
00033|   /** The size of the media asset in bytes. */
00034|   size?: number;
00035|   /** The original URL of the image as stored on the contract. */
00036|   originalUrl?: string;
00037| }
00038| 
00039| // NFT animation information
00040| export interface NftAnimation {
00041|   /** The URL of the animation. */
00042|   cachedUrl?: string;
00043|   /** The original URL of the animation as stored on the contract. */
00044|   originalUrl?: string;
00045|   /** The type of the animation. */
00046|   contentType?: string;
00047|   /** The size of the animation in bytes. */
00048|   size?: number;
00049| }
00050| 
00051| // NFT ownership information response from Alchemy
00052| export interface OwnedNftResponseWithoutMetadata {
00053|   /** The NFT contract address. */
00054|   contractAddress: string;
00055|   /** The NFT token ID. */
00056|   tokenId: string;
00057|   /** The network the NFT is on. */
00058|   network: Network;
00059|   /** The wallet address that owns the NFT. */
00060|   address: string;
00061|   /** The balance of the NFT. */
00062|   balance: string;
00063|   /** Whether the NFT is spam. */
00064|   isSpam?: boolean;
00065|   /** Spammy classifications of the NFT if it is spam. */
00066|   spamClassifications?: string[];
00067| }
00068| 
00069| // Nft ownership
00070| export interface NftOwnershipResponseWithMetadata {
00071|   /** The NFT's underlying contract info. */
00072|   contract: {
00073|     address: string;
00074|     name?: string;
00075|     symbol?: string;
00076|   };
00077|   /** The NFT token ID as an integer string. */
00078|   tokenId: string;
00079|   /** The type of NFT. */
00080|   tokenType?: NftTokenType;
00081|   /** The NFT name. */
00082|   name?: string;
00083|   /** The NFT description. */
00084|   description?: string;
00085|   /** Media URLs and information for the NFT */
00086|   image?: NftImage;
00087|   /** The animation data of the NFT. */
00088|   animation?: NftAnimation;
00089|   /** Collection metadata for the NFT, if available. */
00090|   collection?: {
00091|     name?: string;
00092|     slug?: string;
00093|   };
00094|   /** The raw metadata of the NFT. */
00095|   raw?: {
00096|     /** The raw metadata of the NFT. */
00097|     metadata?: {
00098|       /** The name of the NFT. */
00099|       name?: string;
00100|       /** The description of the NFT. */
00101|       description?: string;
00102|       /** The image URL of the NFT. */
00103|       image?: string;
00104|       /** The animation URL of the NFT. */
00105|       animation_url?: string;
00106|       /** The attributes of the NFT. */
00107|       attributes?: Array<{
00108|         /** The trait type of the attribute. */
00109|         trait_type?: string;
00110|         /** The value of the attribute. */
00111|         value?: any;
00112|       }>;
00113|     }
00114|   }
00115|   /** The blockchain network. */
00116|   network?: Network;
00117|   /** The token URI of the NFT. */
00118|   tokenUri?: string;
00119| }
00120| 
00121| // Nft ownership
00122| export interface OwnedNft extends OwnedNftResponseWithoutMetadata {
00123|   /** The NFT metadata. */
00124|   metadata?: NftOwnershipResponseWithMetadata;
00125| }
00126| 
00127| // Options for fetching NFTs
00128| export interface GetNftsForOwnerOptions {
00129|   /** Optional page key for pagination. */
00130|   pageKey?: string;
00131|   /** Number of NFTs to return (default 100, max 100). */
00132|   pageSize?: number;
00133|   /** Skip fetching metadata for faster response. */
00134|   withMetadata?: boolean;
00135| }
00136| 
00137| // Response for NFTs by wallet
00138| export interface GetNftsByWalletResponse {
00139|   data: {
00140|     /** An array of NFTs owned by the wallet address. */
00141|     ownedNfts: Array<OwnedNft>;
00142|     /** Total number of NFTs owned by the given address. */
00143|     totalCount: number;
00144|     /** A string key used for paginating through the NFT list. */
00145|     pageKey?: string | null;
00146|   };
00147| }
00148| 
00149| // Options for fetching NFT contract owners
00150| export interface GetOwnersForContractOptions {
00151|   /** Whether to include the token balances per token id for each owner. Defaults to false when omitted. */
00152|   withTokenBalances?: boolean;
00153|   /** The block number in hex or decimal to fetch owners for. */
00154|   block?: string;
00155|   /** Optional page key to paginate the next page for large requests. */
00156|   pageKey?: string;
00157|   /** If true, include total count of owners in the response. Only applicable when `withTokenBalances` is not set to `true`. */
00158|   includeCount?: boolean;
00159| }
00160| 
00161| // Response for NFT contract owners
00162| export interface GetOwnersForContractWithoutTokenBalancesAlchemyResponse {
00163|   /** An array of owner addresses for the provided contract address */
00164|   owners: string[];
00165|   /** Total count of unique owners. Only present if includeCount option is true. */
00166|   totalCount?: number;
00167|   /** Optional page key returned when a collection has more than 50,000 owners. */
00168|   pageKey?: string;
00169| }
00170| 
00171| // Token balance information for NFT owners
00172| export interface NftContractTokenBalance {
00173|   /** The token id owned in the NFT contract. */
00174|   tokenId: string;
00175|   /** The token id balance for the provided owner. */
00176|   balance: string;
00177| }
00178| 
00179| // NFT contract owner with token balances
00180| export interface NftContractOwner {
00181|   /** The NFT's owner address. */
00182|   ownerAddress: string;
00183|   /** A list of token balances for the provided NFT contract. */
00184|   /** Only present if withTokenBalances option is true. */
00185|   tokenBalances?: NftContractTokenBalance[];
00186| }
00187| 
00188| // Response when fetching owners with token balances
00189| export interface GetOwnersForContractResponse {
00190|   /** An array of owner addresses for the provided contract address */
00191|   owners: NftContractOwner[];
00192|   /** Optional page key returned when a collection has more than 50,000 owners. */
00193|   pageKey?: string;
00194|   /** Total count of unique owners. Only present if includeCount option is true. */
00195|   totalCount?: number;
00196| }
00197| 
00198| // NFT metadata batch token request
00199| export interface NftMetadataBatchToken {
00200|   /** The NFT contract address. Limited to ERC721 and ERC1155 tokens. */
00201|   contractAddress: string;
00202|   /** The id of the NFT. */
00203|   tokenId: BigNumberish;
00204|   /** Optional field to specify the type of token to speed up the query. */
00205|   tokenType?: NftTokenType.ERC1155 | NftTokenType.ERC721;
00206| }
00207| 
00208| // Response for NFT metadata batch
00209| export interface GetNftMetadataBatchResponse {
00210|   /** An array of NFT metadata objects. */
00211|   nfts: NftOwnershipResponseWithMetadata[];
00212| }
</file>
